overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character exploring a grand gothic castle interior with stone architecture and ornate wooden staircases. The character ascends multiple flights of stairs through candlelit corridors and halls, passing marble busts, oil paintings, and other students in a magical school setting.

events.description: turns left from entrance hall into narrow stone corridor with arches

agents.ego_description: ascending initial stone stairs and walking steadily through the corridor, passing wooden benches and wall sconces

segments.scene_description: The character begins at the bottom of a grand stone staircase, ascending into a historic building with gothic architecture. The camera follows through an entrance hall and into a narrow corridor lined with marble busts, oil paintings, and lit by warm wall sconces.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor into a spacious hall illuminated by tall gothic windows, the character approaches and begins ascending a grand wooden staircase. The space opens up with high ceilings and massive stone pillars while the character climbs the ornate stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper staircase landing and hall with golden statue

events.description: approaches large golden statue holding a sphere at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb multiple flights of stairs, turning on landings, approaching the golden statue

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending through the stairwell, passing tall windows and turning on landings. A prominent golden statue of a robed figure holding a sphere comes into view at the top of the stairs, marking the entrance to a grand hall.

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded great hall and climbing the sweeping curved staircase

large patterned carpet covering the marble floor
decorative wrought iron balustrade along the staircase
large circular stained glass window with intricate designs

segments.scene_description: Entering a vast great hall filled with other students, the character approaches and begins ascending a magnificent curved grand staircase. The hall features ornate rugs, stained glass windows, and a high vaulted ceiling while students in robes move about the space.

agents.ego_description: climbing narrow stairs, entering the green room, and ascending the spiral wooden staircase

entered.detail: dark green painted wood paneling covering the walls
large brass and wood orrery or celestial model on a stand
tight spiral staircase with wooden steps and railings

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow corridor and enters a distinctive room with dark green wall paneling and astronomical instruments. The character then begins ascending a tight spiral wooden staircase that winds upward through the space.

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the spiral stairs, the character enters a narrow gothic corridor with pointed stone arches and rough stone walls. Other students walk through the corridor as the character proceeds forward past framed paintings and wall sconces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle that transitions from narrow, candlelit corridors into vast ceremonial halls before winding back into intimate, scholarly spaces. It begins at the base of a grand stone staircase, following the character through an entrance hall and a corridor lined with marble busts and oil paintings. As the space opens into a spacious hall with high ceilings and massive pillars, the camera ascends an ornate wooden staircase and passes a golden statue of a robed figure. The scene then expands into a magnificent great hall filled with students and stained glass windows, where the character climbs a curved grand staircase before moving through a room of dark green paneling and astronomical instruments. Finally, the camera winds up a tight spiral staircase and emerges into a narrow gothic corridor of pointed stone arches and rough walls, passing other students and framed paintings.
